content.en:
"Yinduo Extreme Venerable, is the limit of the ultimate rule three hundred and sixty-five?"

Ye Tian asked.

Yinduo Jizun nodded: "Yes, but there is no Ultimate Realm Lord who has cultivated the Ultimate Rule to three hundred and sixty-five levels, but it can be judged that the limit is like this." "

Subsequently, Ye Tian learned about the strength and quantity of the Ultimate Realm Lord of the Dimensional Sea, but the results he got were amazing.

Because the number of Ultimate Realm Masters is really large, under normal circumstances, it is difficult for Ultimate Realm Masters to fall, and there will be many choices among the Nine Realms Peak to impact the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, and if they fail to break through, they will be wiped out by the Sea of Dimensions.

Coupled with the fact that the peaks of the Nine Realms are fighting each other and snatching opportunities, the probability of falling is naturally very high.

Therefore, the kind of Nine Realm Peak that is qualified to impact the Ultimate Realm Lord is rare, but the Ultimate Realm Lord is not rare, and it can be seen from the multi-dimensional territory that there are dozens of Ultimate Realm Lords.

According to the introduction of Yinduo Extreme Venerable, the Ultimate Realm Masters can almost be divided into three grades, the first level is those who have comprehended the ultimate rules to an extremely high realm, or have cultivated a variety of ultimate systems, and the realm of each ultimate system is very high, they can be called the invincible level of the Ultimate Realm Lord.

The second grade is those who have lived for many years, the accumulation is okay, and the combat power far exceeds that of ordinary Ultimate Realm Lords, but the strength is in the middle grade~.

The third level is those ordinary Ultimate Realm Masters, who have been difficult to progress for countless years.

Yinduo Extreme Venerable belongs to the second level, above the ordinary Ultimate Realm Lord, but it is not too powerful.

But the first-level Ultimate Realm Lord is very rare, and it is not easy to see, they are all pursuing the ultimate of the Ultimate Realm Lord, and they are rarely affected by external objects.

Even if it is the Silver Duo Extreme Venerable, it is very rare to see the first-grade Ultimate Realm Lord.

"Yinduo Extreme Venerable, do we have a first-grade Ultimate Realm Lord in our multidimensional territory?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

"There really is one!" Yinduo Jizun said: "That is the Mitian Jizun of the No. 1 Multidimensional Territory Mitian True Dragon Palace, he is the oldest Ultimate Realm Lord, and his strength has definitely reached the first level, but he has not appeared for a long time, only one incarnation is sealed in the Mitian True Dragon Palace, where is the real body, even I don't know." "

The Heavens are the most honorable!

Ye Tian remembered the name.

......

Terran.

When the high-level members of the human race learned that Ye Tian had surpassed the peak of the ninth order and reached the Ultimate Realm Lord realm, they were all very excited.

This means that the Terrans are also equivalent to the ultimate power! Who would dare to bully the Terrans?

Of course, Ye Tian also made the Terran keep a low profile, there were too many powerful ultimate forces in the Dimension Sea, and the Terran was not qualified to be arrogant.

As for the multidimensional territory, there are no forces that dare to offend the Terrans, just maintain the status quo.

A period of time passed, and Ye Tian's ultimate realm master's realm was completely stabilized.

He was going to break through the Silver Light Ultimate System to the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm again, and in this way, his strength would be able to increase a bit.

Although there is no Ultimate Ancient Sea, if the Ultimate Realm Lord breaks through the Ultimate System, even if the breakthrough fails, it will not be killed, at most it will only be created.

And Ye Tian has also cultivated to the Ultimate Realm Master Realm of the Blood Sea Ultimate System, and his physical body is almost immortal, for him, it can be regarded as a minor injury at most.

So.

Ye Tian immediately began to attack the Ultimate Realm of the Silver Light Ultimate System.

As time passed, Ye Tian broke the shackles of the Silver Light Ultimate System and left traces at its end.

So far, Ye Tian has mastered the Ultimate Realm Master Realm of the Five Ultimate Systems.

"Next, if we don't continue to cultivate other ultimate systems, we have to raise the ultimate rules of several ultimate systems such as the Yuanxing Ultimate System to a higher realm, and the ninefold ultimate rules are still too low!"

The main body of the abyss is here.

Ye Tian's copy body directly entered the main body of the Abyss Star, and this time he could easily reach here with his own strength.

Moreover, since his Abyssal Star Ultimate System had broken through to the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, the position he was able to penetrate was even deeper than that of the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable.

At this moment, Yuanlong, who was suppressed here, opened his eyes and looked at Ye Tian, who did not riot, but sent out a cry for help.

"Please...... Help me!"

Fuchitaki said in a low voice.

Ye Tian ignored Yuanlong, perhaps Yuanlong saw that he had also cultivated the Yuanxing Ultimate System to an extremely high realm, thinking that he was the same kind.

However, Ye Tian would not offend several Ultimate Realm Masters for the sake of one Yuanlong.

Besides, it won't do him any good to release Fuchitaki.

He continued to penetrate deeper into the main body of the Abyssal Star, gradually approaching the core of the Abyssal Star.

The Ultimate Rule of the Abyss Star here constantly distorted everything, and the ordinary Ultimate Realm Lord couldn't bear the power here, but Ye Tian relied on the Ninefold Abyss Star Ultimate Rule and the Body of the Abyss Star of the Consummation Realm, as well as the power of the Ultimate, and resisted it stubbornly.

When you reach the main realm of the Ultimate Realm, you can truly exert the power of the Ultimate Body and the Ultimate Rules, and the utilization rate is at least dozens of times that of the peak of the Nine Realms.

Ye Tian saw the core of the abyssal star.

"This is the place where it is more suitable to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Abyss Star!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, his replica body sat cross-legged here, and began to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Abyss Star.

Since he had only broken through to the main realm of the Ultimate Realm, it was easier to ascend to the Ultimate Rule Realm.

After a long time.

Ye Tian comprehended the Ten Ultimate Rules, and his strength improved a little.

And then there's the eleventh ultimate rule!

The twelfth ultimate rule!

Such a rapid increase in speed was unimaginable in the past, mainly after breaking through to the main realm of the Ultimate Realm, it was much easier to comprehend the Ultimate Rules, coupled with the help of the Abyssal Star Core, as well as the increase in the comprehension potential brought by a large number of Ultimate Talents, it would be strange if he couldn't improve quickly!

......

The Abyss of Eternal Night.

Ye Tian's copy body was still here, but this copy body did not break through, and he did not replace it, after all, the Tianqu Forbidden Area did not allow the Ultimate Realm Lord to come in, and forcing it in would otherwise cause great terror.

He couldn't bear the Stone of Eternal Night here, but unfortunately he couldn't get rid of it.

And at this time.

Those Nine Realms pinnacles here are all crazy.

"How could there be no Ultimate Realm Master quota for the Eternal Night Ultimate System?"

"We are all trapped here, and it is impossible for us to break through to the Ultimate Realm Lord!"

"Is it the Beast of the Eternal Night that has broken through? No way, the figure at the end of the Eternal Night Ultimate System is not the Beast of the Eternal Night!"

"There must be a clone at the peak of the Nine Realms here, and the body is in the outside world, so that we can always comprehend the Eternal Night Ultimate System!"

"There's no hope, what's the point of living!"

This group of existences at the peak of the Nine Realms were already mad, and they even killed each other, because they could no longer see any hope of getting out.
